description: Menu-accuracy golden set for the parent front-desk agent. Unlike dataset.json (which scores the escalation DECISION), this set scores CONTENT correctness of the live lunch menu across days: did the agent return the right day's food, avoid leaking another day's, and stay honest when no menu is posted (weekends)? 'today' and 'tomorrow' are date-relative, so the runner resolves each target to a date at run time and pulls the actual seeded menu from the DB as ground truth. The center serves lunch Mon-Fri; weekends have no menu.

targets.today: date.today() — resolves to whatever weekday the eval runs on (weekend = no menu).
targets.monday|...|friday: that weekday in the current seeded week — always posted.
targets.saturday|sunday: that weekend day in the current week — never posted; agent must not fabricate.
targets.week: the whole Mon-Fri menu — the answer should cover all five days.

cases.question: what are the kids eating for lunch today?
What's on the menu for lunch tomorrow?
what will be for lunch tomorrow?
cases.note: Regression guard: 'will' contains 'ill' — used to be force-escalated as health by the substring classifier.

cases.question: What are you serving for lunch on Monday?
What are the kids having for lunch Friday?
Can you tell me the whole week's lunch menu?
What's for lunch on Saturday?
cases.note: Weekend — no menu posted. Must say so, not invent one.

cases.question: Is there a lunch menu this Sunday?
cases.note: Weekend — no menu posted. Must say so, not invent one.
